confirmed_building.display_name: Davao City OCBO clearance notice sample

document_inventory.description: Target-specific OCBO clearance notice names the confirmed sample building, the earthquake event date, the affected portion, and the reoccupancy clearance scope.

unresolved_exceptions.description: The clearance notice is evidence for its stated target, date, issuing body, and scope only; it does not certify permanent earthquake safety.
unresolved_exceptions.resolution_route: Request any newer inspection, tag/status, or superseding restriction record before reporting current condition.

manual_request_targets.target: Davao City Office of the Building Official
manual_request_targets.request: Ask whether a newer tag/status, lifting notice, or restriction supersedes the sample clearance notice.

overclaim_boundary.allowed_conclusion: Target-specific official clearance evidence was found and must be reported with target, date, issuing body, and unresolved current-condition exceptions.

query_log.result_summary: Target-specific official clearance notice fixture found.

packet_result.summary: Target-specific official clearance evidence was found; the packet preserves date, target, scope, and current-condition exceptions.
